entities.name: User/AI Trigger
entities.context: Initiates the process in the knowledge system

entities.name: LLM
entities.context: Refers to the Language Model used in the system

entities.name: SESSION_STATE
entities.context: Context information that the LLM reads

relationships.context: User/AI Trigger initiates interaction with the LLM
LLM reads the SESSION_STATE for context
LLM writes a Markdown file based on the information
Generated file triggers the worker script
Script saves assignments in temporary records
Updates parent session state after saving
